name: Fumadocs (Next.js Documentation Framework)

performance.notes: Static generation; Next.js RSC for fast page loads

agent_readiness.notes: Next.js-native documentation framework. MDX content with fumadocs-mdx. File-based routing with sidebar generation. OpenAPI integration for auto-generated API docs. Full-text search via Orama. fumadocs-ui for pre-built components (Table of Contents, Sidebar, Breadcrumbs). Shadcn/Tailwind compatible. TypeScript. Alternative to Nextra — more flexible, more Next.js-native. AI-powered docs search. Growing ecosystem. Chosen by many Next.js libraries for their docs sites.

gotchas: Smaller community than Nextra or Docusaurus
Breaking changes as it matures rapidly
best_when: Next.js projects wanting documentation co-located with app
Teams already using shadcn/ui wanting consistent design system
Projects wanting full-text search without Algolia
avoid_when: Teams unfamiliar with Next.js App Router
summary: Fumadocs is a Next.js-native documentation framework using MDX, file-based routing, and auto-generated sidebars. fumadocs-ui for shadcn/Tailwind components. OpenAPI integration for API docs. Orama full-text search. TypeScript. Growing alternative to Nextra with better Next.js App Router support. Best for Next.js apps wanting co-located docs. Use Docusaurus for framework-agnostic or large plugin ecosystem.
